refined_caption: There is water on the hospital floor and a bed is visible in the background. The water appears to be a puddle.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member on the general ward and noticed a puddle of water on the floor. This is a slipping hazard and could lead to accidents. The hospital should clean this up immediately to ensure patient safety.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor on the general ward, it's a real slipping hazard.
